title: fsstore version-aware Put with ErrVersionConflict (single-writer)
acceptance_criteria: Put re-reads the on-disk file just before the atomic rename; aborts with ErrVersionConflict if expectVersion >= 0 and the disk version differs from expectVersion. Read+rename ordering plus POSIX rename atomicity is sufficient for the single-writer model Phase 1 targets; cross-process per-item locking arrives in Phase 3 (TTR-E03-S04) when concurrent agents become possible.
Phase 1's deliverable is single-writer; the docstring and CHANGELOG note this explicitly so users do not assume multi-agent safety yet.
Put persists the Item the caller supplied verbatim — Version and UpdatedAt are set by the usecase before Put is invoked. fsstore never imports a Clock.
Tests cover the conflict path, the success path, and the no-expectation path (expectVersion = -1).
